## Template Hub 1.0.5

This release focuses on search and filtering improvements in the upload and gallery flows.

### Highlights

- improved the upload wizard so dashboard results are selected first and loaded explicitly, which makes misclicks much less likely
- added clearer metadata guidance in the upload flow, including visible limits for title, descriptions, folder, and tags
- improved image preview layout in the upload step
- enhanced dashboard search results with deeper folder context such as `General > folder1 > folder2`
- upgraded template tag filtering to support multi-select with match-many behavior

### Notes

- release assets contain the ready-to-unpack plugin directory for Grafana
- this version keeps the current OSS fallback behavior while remaining Enterprise RBAC-ready
